svg.text: Azure AKS — Multi-AZ High Availability Architecture
3 Availability Zones • Zone-Redundant • 99.99% SLA • Automatic Failover
Zone-redundant with Standard tier (99.95% SLA) or Premium tier (99.99% SLA)
Private link / tunnel to AKS subnet
Zones [1,2,3] • HTTPS :443 • WAF v2 • Autoscale 2-10 • Zone-Redundant Public IP
NAT Gateway (Zone-Redundant Public IP) — Single gateway, NOT per-AZ
Istio Ambient Mesh — mTLS STRICT across all Zones • Cross-zone service discovery • L4/L7 traffic management
DB Subnet 10.0.10.0/24 (Delegated to PostgreSQL Flexible Server)
Premium Tier • zone_redundant = true • Azure manages partition distribution across all zones
zones = [1, 2, 3] • Premium tier required for zone redundancy • Sentinel handles promotion
HA Summary: AKS zones [1,2,3] • Control Plane zone-redundant • PostgreSQL ZoneRedundant • Event Hubs zone-redundant • Redis Premium 3-zone • App GW v2
Every component zone-redundant • 99.99% SLA with AZ spread • Automatic failover at every layer
BookStore Platform • Azure AKS Multi-AZ HA Architecture • Terraform IaC
